dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Starting dose is 0.5 mg twice a day ( 2.1 ) May increase dose to 1 mg twice a day after 4 weeks if starting dosage is well tolerated but does not adequately control IBS symptoms ( 2.1 ) Discontinue alosetron tablets in patients who have not had adequate control of IBS symptoms after 4 weeks of treatment with 1 mg twice a day. ( 2.1 ) 2.1 Adult Patients To lower the risk of constipation, alosetron tablets should be started at a dosage of 0.5 mg twice a day. Patients wh
